\title{FRAME1\_NEYMAN: Census Tract Frame for Detroit Transportation Security Survey}
\author{Team Neyman -- SURV 745}
\date{}

\begin{document}

\maketitle

\section*{Description}

This document presents the tract-level area frame for the Detroit Transportation Security Survey. The frame consists of 266 census tracts in Detroit, Michigan, compiled from the 2020 U.S. Census. Each tract includes demographic information necessary for survey design and sample allocation, including total persons, households, age-specific populations, and a composite measure of size (CompMOS) used for probability-proportional-to-size sampling.

\section*{Summary Statistics}

\begin{itemize}
\item \textbf{Number of Census Tracts:} 266
\item \textbf{Total Population:} 639,090
\item \textbf{Total Adults (18+):} 480,102
\item \textbf{Total Households:} 309,902
\item \textbf{Total Composite MOS:} 2154.46\
\end{itemize}

\newpage
